category_sources: Official GitHub README describes GCI as a tool for deterministic Go import ordering.
source_facts.description says it controls Golang package import order deterministically.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gci; official README title and project name use GCI.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface with installation, usage, and command reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/daixiang0/gci, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README documents import sections, formatting modes, and CLI commands.
